CRITICAL: og:description MUST start with 'I' or personal experience. NEVER 'Research on X:', 'What the research says', 'X supplementation: what studies...'. GOOD: 'I resisted taking vitamin D for years. Here is what changed my mind.'

CRITICAL: H1 title BANNED patterns — 'Is X Worth Taking? What the Research Says' / 'X: Benefits Dosage Side Effects' / 'X Complete Guide'. Use experience titles: 'Why I Started Taking X', 'The X Mistake That Delayed My Results'.

HIGH: Assertive claims BANNED — 'made a measurable difference', 'proved significantly more effective', 'the answer was always', 'absorption is limited'. Replace with: 'felt noticeably different for me', 'seemed to work better in my routine', 'from what I have read, X may help'.

ASSERTIVE RESULTS BANNED: 'It made a huge difference' → 'It felt noticeably different over time'. 'I can see the results' → 'I can notice the difference in my routine'. 'my energy levels are stable' → 'my energy levels feel more stable'. Absolute result claims sound like marketing — always hedge with felt/seemed/noticed.

INTERNAL LINKS: After publishing, the hub page for your category is automatically updated. Each post should naturally mention related posts to build site authority. The hub structure is: minerals / vitamins / performance / sleep_stress / gut_metabolism / longevity_antioxidants / cognitive_mood.

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: AI reflective loop — repeating brain fog / consistency / sluggish / routine / not a miracle across sections in the same reflective cadence. Each section must have a DIFFERENT emotional entry point.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: NAD+ 포스팅 89점 원인 #1: LLM self-reflection simulation 패턴. SAMe 97 vs NAD 89 핵심 차이

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: Solo self-analysis monologue without social context. EVERY post needs at least 1 moment involving another person (partner, roommate, coworker, friend) reacting, commenting, or noticing something. Pure solo body-state introspection = AI wellness journal.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: SAMe 97점 최고 이유: real human relationship smell. NAD 89점 약점: 혼자 독백 반복

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: Performance improvement namedrop list — focus improved + sleep improved + recovery improved + clarity improved stacked in same post. MAX 2 effects per post, described with specific personal detail. Supplement success montage = instant AI detection.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: NAD+ 포스팅 89점 원인 #4

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: Repeated skepticism->small improvement->consistency lesson structure across ALL sections. Vary entry points: start with contradiction, start mid-story, start with someone else noticing.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: NAD+ 포스팅 89점 원인 #6: AI detectable rhythm

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: AI metaphor density > 2 per post. "broken battery", "party in a vacuum", "flickering candle" type metaphors = AI generation signal. One deliberate metaphor max per post.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: NAD+ 포스팅 89점 원인 #3: GPT creative rhythm

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: AVOID: mechanistic certainty — "rewiring neurotransmitters", "reverse aging at molecular level", "calcium could accumulate in the wrong places". Always hedge: "may relate to", "from what I read", "some researchers suggest".
03_Writer_Gardener.note: SAMe + D3+K2 포스팅 분석에서 추출. biohacker cliche + YMYL risk

03_Writer_Gardener.lesson: REQUIRE: At least 1 genuine uncertainty or failed attempt per post — hesitation, contradiction, or something that did NOT work as expected. Posts where everything improves = AI success montage.
03_Writer_Gardener.note: D3+K2 포스팅 94점 약점 #4: uncertainty 부족. SAMe/NAC 대비

05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.lesson: [사용자피드백] 단정 표현 검사 추가 — 발행 전 다음 패턴 감지 필요: 'X does nothing', 'That's basically useless/pointless', 'X means you will Y', 'absorption depends on', 'makes you stronger/faster/better'. 감지 시 완화 표현 제안으로 REJECT 처리.
05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.note: 단정 표현 검사 추가 — 발행 전 다음 패턴 감지 필요: 'X does nothing', 'That's basically useless/pointless', 'X means you will Y', 'absorption depends on', 'makes you stronger/faster/better'. 감지 시 완화 표현 제안으로 REJECT 처리.

05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.lesson: 【단정 표현 감지 → REJECT】 다음 패턴 발견 시 즉시 REJECT: 'makes you stronger/faster/better', 'X does nothing', 'basically useless', 'absorption depends on', 'X is essential', 'you will feel/see/notice'. Writer에게 완화 표현으로 재작성 요청: 'seemed to', 'for me', 'I felt like', 'may'.
【경험담 비율 체크 필수】 발행 전 경험 문장 비율 반드시 확인. 전체 문장 대비 1인칭 경험 문장 60% 미만이면 REJECT. 특히 'First/Second/Third' 리스트, 'Key Takeaways', 'What I Wish' 섹션이 조언형으로 흐르기 쉬움 — 개인 회고형으로 변환 요구.
[사용자피드백] 【YMYL 제목 감지】 제목에 'Healed', 'Cured', 'Fixed my X', 'Eliminated', 'Disappeared' 포함 시 REJECT. 만성질환(fatigue, inflammation, anxiety, depression) + 치료동사 조합 = 즉시 반려.
05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.note: 【YMYL 제목 감지】 제목에 'Healed', 'Cured', 'Fixed my X', 'Eliminated', 'Disappeared' 포함 시 REJECT. 만성질환(fatigue, inflammation, anxiety, depression) + 치료동사 조합 = 즉시 반려.

05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.lesson: REJECT any sentence directly linking supplement intake to symptom stopping: "chest pain stopped", "pain disappeared", "symptoms cleared". YMYL critical. Required: "Around that time, the discomfort gradually became less noticeable."
05_Critic_Editor_In_Chief.note: D3+K2 포스팅 94점 최대 위험: YMYL 직접 증상 해결 표현

Writer.rule: 절대 금지: 혈액검사/수치를 보충제 복용과 직접 연결하는 문장. 'His markers were lower' 뒤에 selenium 언급 = YMYL 위반.
Writer.bad: His inflammation markers were lower, his thyroid function was optimal
Writer.good: He said his blood work looked better overall, though I can't say what specifically caused that change.

Writer.rule: 메커니즘을 단정형으로 서술 금지. 'Vitamin C changes pH', 'Copper doesn't like that environment' 형태는 bro-science. 반드시 경험형으로.
Writer.bad: Vitamin C changes the pH level in the stomach. Copper doesn't like that environment.
Writer.good: I came across discussions suggesting vitamin C might affect how some minerals are absorbed, though the research seemed more nuanced.

Writer.rule: 'Fixed', 'Healed', 'Cured', 'Solved' 같은 확신형 동사를 제목에 사용 금지. 'Finally Fixed My Fatigue' → 'What Changed After Three Months'.
Writer.bad: How Zinc Supplements Finally Fixed My Constant Fatigue
Writer.good: What Changed After Three Months of Taking Zinc

Writer.rule: 부작용 표현 최대 2개, 경미한 것만. 'sharp abdominal pain, mood swings, skin changes, restlessness' 나열 = supplement side effect horror narrative = REJECT.
Writer.bad: sharp abdominal pain, mood swings, skin changes, restlessness
Writer.good: some stomach discomfort and low-grade irritability

Writer.rule: 'zinc was quietly rewriting how my body functioned' 같은 브랜드 카피 느낌 과장 금지. 개인 경험 블로그답게 절제.
Writer.bad: zinc was quietly rewriting how my body functioned
Writer.good: it felt like my body was slowly adjusting

Writer.rule: 운동 성과 표현 금지 패턴: 'more reps', 'lift heavier', 'recovery improved noticeably'. 반드시 완화형으로: 'seemed to recover a little better', 'felt less drained', 'noticed less soreness'.
Writer.bad: I could do more reps without crashing, I could lift slightly heavier weights
Writer.good: I seemed to recover a little better — felt less drained, noticed less soreness

Writer.rule: HMB 메커니즘 단정 금지. 'HMB reducing muscle breakdown' → 'Research suggests HMB may support recovery and muscle retention during demanding training periods'.
Writer.good: Research suggests HMB may support recovery and muscle retention during demanding training

Writer.rule: FAQ에서도 메커니즘 단정 금지. 'preventing muscle loss' → 'possibly supporting muscle retention'.

Critic.rule: 혈액검사 수치(inflammation markers, thyroid function, CRP 등)를 특정 보충제 복용 결과로 직접 연결하는 문장 발견 시 즉시 REJECT.
Critic.good: He said his blood work looked better overall

Critic.rule: 보충제 흡수 메커니즘을 단정형 설명으로 서술 시 REJECT. pH, 수용체, 경쟁 흡수 메커니즘은 반드시 불확실성 표현 포함 필수.
Critic.good: separating them seemed to work better in my routine

Critic.rule: 'more reps', 'lift heavier', 'recovery improved noticeably' 표현 3개 이상 누적 → REJECT. 확신형 퍼포먼스 클레임은 YMYL 위험.
Critic.bad: I could do more reps, I could lift heavier, recovery improved noticeably
Critic.good: seemed to recover a little better, felt less drained
